headword_jp: {射|しゃ}{撃|げき}{段|だん}{階|かい}

alt_forms.note: ⚠️ WH: Exact WH40K Japan term for the shooting phase. AoS 4th ed. Japan changed this to 遠隔フェイズ. Using 射撃段階 avoids the WH compound.

definitions.gloss_en: the phase of a turn in which units with ranged weapons may fire at enemy targets
definitions.gloss_jp: {遠|えん}{距|きょ}{離|り}{攻|こう}{撃|げき}を{持|も}つ{ユニット|ゆにっと}が{攻|こう}{撃|げき}できる{手|て}{番|ばん}の{段|だん}{階|かい}
definitions.explanation_en: A dedicated phase for ranged combat. Units eligible to shoot select targets and resolve ranged attacks.
definitions.implicit_notes: 射撃 (shageki, shooting/firing) is a standard Japanese military term used in military ballistics and JWC documentation. It is not a WH coinage. The risk is the 射撃フェイズ compound, which is the exact WH40K Japan phase name.
definitions.orthography_notes: 射撃: 射 (shoot/arrow) + 撃 (strike). Attested in the Goo dictionary as a military/ballistics term. 段階 replaces フェイズ to form a distinct compound.
definitions.game_setting_notes: High-priority WH flag per the docx. 射撃フェイズ is the direct WH40K/AoS Japan term (AoS 4th ed. later changed it to 遠隔フェイズ for ranged phase). 射撃段階 is the recommended safe alternative.

usage_jp: {射|しゃ}{撃|げき}{段|だん}{階|かい}に{遠|えん}{距|きょ}{離|り}{攻|こう}{撃|げき}を{行|おこな}う (perform ranged attacks during the shooting phase)
comparative_notes: 射撃フェイズ is high-priority WH. 射撃段階 achieves the same meaning. AoS Japan's 遠隔フェイズ (remote/ranged phase) is a third option but carries a different WH association.

examples.japanese: {射|しゃ}{撃|げき}{段|だん}{階|かい}に{遠|えん}{距|きょ}{離|り}{攻|こう}{撃|げき}を{宣|せん}{言|げん}する。
examples.english: Declare a ranged attack in the shooting phase.

cross_references.note: フェイズ — why 段階 is preferred
遠距離攻撃 — ranged attack; primary action in this phase
